title: Greatest librarian
description: Change some of the default textures to a more criatic analog but only from the books.
body:
Change some of the default textures to a more criatic analog but only from the books.

Tired of vanilla textures download this resource pack and feel more new emotions.

How to install
Download Bare Bones gl.zip
Go to %appdata%
Copy the .zip to / Roaming /.minecraft/resourcepacks
(You can uninstall the old version you installed)

Load Minecraft and select the "gl" texture pack
